mapper.sql: select order_item_id, order_id, landlord_user_id, user_id, type, product_id, num, price, total, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sys_order_item
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_order_item
order_id, landlord_user_id, user_id, type, product_id, num, price, total, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{orderId}, #{landlordUserId}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{productId}, #{num}, #{price}, #{total}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},

insert into sys_order_item
order_id, landlord_user_id, user_id, type, product_id, num, price, total, status, create_time
values
#{item.orderId}, #{item.landlordUserId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.type}, #{item.productId}, #{item.num}, #{item.price}, #{item.total}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}
mapper.delete: update sys_order_item set del_flag = 2 where order_item_id = #{orderItemId}
update sys_order_item set del_flag = 2 where order_id = #{orderId}

update sys_order_item set del_flag = 2 where order_item_id in
#{orderItemId}
